emiratesid.ae.readersmgt
Class PCSCReader

java.lang.Object
  emiratesid.ae.readersmgt.PCSCReader

public class PCSCReader
extends java.lang.Object

Copyright (c) 2010 LOGICA. All Rights Reserved.
Represents any smart card reader PC/SC compliant

Since:
1.6
Version:
2.0
Author:
Hakim SEBSSI

Constructor Summary
PCSCReader()
           
 
Method Summary
 void connect(long Context)
          establish a connection between the toolkit and the inserted smart card
 void disconnect()
          disconnect the current smart card connection and release its resources
 void extractATR()
          extract the ATR from the current connected smart card, use getATR method to retrieve the ATR
 char[] getATR()
          Reads Card ATR
 BiometricFacade getBiometricFacade()
          Initialize and retrieve BiometricFacade object
 long getCardHandle()
          Card Handle that identifies the connection for each card, valid for connected Mode only
 CardInfo getCardInfo()
          Retrieves an initialized instance of CardInfo which contains all related Card data
 PKIFacade getPKIFacade()
          Initialize and retrieve PKIFacade object
 PublicDataFacade getPublicDataFacade()
          Initialize and retrieve PublicDataFacade object
 java.lang.String getReaderName()
          PCSC Reader name
 int getStatus()
          Retrieves card status
 int getType()
          retrieves the Card type
 boolean isConnected()
          Check if the card is in CONNECTED status
 void setATR(char[] aTR)
          Sets the current Card ATR value Used Internally
 void setCardHandle(long cardHandle)
          Sets the card handle for the current PCSC Reader Used internally
 void setReaderName(java.lang.String readerName)
          PCSC Reader name
 void setStatus(int status)
          Sets the current card status Used internally
 void setType(int type)
          Sets the current card type Used internally

getType

retrieves the Card type

Returns:
card type enumerated value, use CardTypeEnum

connect

public void connect(long Context)
             throws MiddlewareException
establish a connection between the toolkit and the inserted smart card

Parameters:
Context - established context
Throws:
MiddlewareException

extractATR

                throws MiddlewareException
extract the ATR from the current connected smart card, use getATR method to retrieve the ATR

Throws:
MiddlewareException

public CardInfo getCardInfo()
Retrieves an initialized instance of CardInfo which contains all related Card data

Returns:
initialized CardInfo object

initialized PKIFacade object

Initialize and retrieve BiometricFacade object

Returns:
initialized BiometricFacade object

public void disconnect()
                throws MiddlewareException
disconnect the current smart card connection and release its resources

Throws:
MiddlewareException

isConnected

public boolean isConnected()
Check if the card is in CONNECTED status

Returns:
true if connected, false otherwise

Sets the card handle for the current PCSC Reader Used internally

cardHandle - card handle
